 Output magnetic field H.

 Output electric displacement \(\mathbf{D} = \varepsilon \mathbf{E}\).

 Output magnetic flux density \(\mathbf{B} = \mu \mathbf{H}\).

 Output Poynting vectors (inc/sca/ext)
 
#define FORCE   32
 (reserved) force output
 
#define POWER   64
 Output total power crossing domain boundaries.
 

Detailed Description

Orchestrates a full simulation run: parse job/subjobs, build the linear system, solve it, and optionally post-process fields.

One SimJob corresponds to one mesh and wavelength setup, with possibly multiple subjobs (different incident fields) reusing the same system matrix.

Definition in file SimJob.h.
